text_jp:
貴様がうわさに聞く
仮面ライダー第１号か{END}
text_en: So you are the rumored first Kamen Rider.{END}

text_jp:
ちょうど良い、
おもしろい物をご覧に入れよう{END}
text_en: Perfect timing. I will show you something interesting.{END}

text_jp:
生体改造を受ける者は頭脳、体力共に
優れた者でなければならない　{END}
text_en: Those who undergo bio-remodeling must possess superior intellect and physical strength.　{END}

text_jp:
不完全な人間どもにその資質を
求める事など、そもそも間違いなのだ{END}
text_en: It was wrong from the start to seek those qualities in imperfect humans.{END}

text_jp:
ならば、完全な資質を持った
肉体を造るまでの事{END}
text_en: All we need do is create bodies with perfect qualities.{END}

text_jp: 死ぬ前に見せてやろう{END}
text_en: I will let you see it before you die.{END}

text_jp:
間もなくこやつらで
生体改造ビールスの実験を行う{END}
text_en: Soon we will use these bodies to test the bio-remodeling virus.{END}

text_jp:
この実験が成功すれば、もはや
素体となる人間を捕まえる必要はない{END}
text_en: If this experiment succeeds, we will no longer need to capture humans as base bodies.{END}

text_jp:
この完全な肉体全てに
生体改造ビールスを注入すればいいのだ{END}
text_en: We need only inject the bio-remodeling virus into all of these perfect bodies.{END}

text_jp: …どうだ、素晴らしいと思わんか{END}

もうじきその中は改造人間の肉体組織を
破壊するアンドロガスで満たされる{END}
text_en: Soon that chamber will be filled with Andro Gas, which destroys the tissue of cyborg bodies.{END}

text_jp: …お前はそこで溶けて無くなるのだ！{END}
実験の準備は出来たか！？{END}
text_en: Are the preparations for the experiment complete!?{END}

text_jp: 何をしている！報告せんか！{END}

text_en: Zol, no matter how many times you are revived…{END}

text_jp: お前の望みは何ひとつ葉わない！{END}
text_en: Not one of your wishes will ever come true!{END}

text_jp: むぅ…おのれ一文字隼人…やれっ！{END}
text_en: Ngh… damn you, Hayato Ichimonji… Do it!{END}

text_jp:
…閉じ込められた
作業員を助けださなければ…{END}
text_en: …I have to rescue the trapped workers…{END}

text_jp:
俺は大丈夫だ。それよりも
作業員を…彼等を頼む！{END}
text_en: I am fine. More importantly, the workers… take care of them!{END}
